calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Robert L. Wood, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Western Machinery Electric, Inc.
Leonard Horowitz, Vice President of plaintiff Western Machinery Electric, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Simmax Energy, LLC.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 29, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, February 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, February 1, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant American Contractors Indemnity Company was filed on November 25, 2008.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant 50 Beale Street Property, LLC was filed on March 12, 2008.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants City & County of San Francisco and Department of General Services were filed on July 7, 2007.
Matter settled as to defendant Gill Fremont Street Partners.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Western Machinery Electric, Inc., and against defendant Simmax Energy, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $15,715.06.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,940.01.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $630.00
Less $5,185.05 in prior payments, for a total judgment in the amount of $22,100.02.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than February 4, 2009.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Off Calendar
